h1.visual_description: All-caps, sans-serif or light serif, small font size, used as a running head at the top of the page.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; likely large serif font for chapter titles.

visual_matchers.pattern: FIGURE [NUMBER].[NUMBER] followed by descriptive text in a smaller serif font, justified, positioned below an image.
Horizontal rule at the bottom of a column followed by a superscript number and citation text.
Italicized words within standard serif body text.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Footnote style with superscript numbering in-text; full citation at bottom of page (Author, Title, Page).

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (two-column) below full-width or column-width imagery.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top left: Book/Chapter title in all caps. Top right: Page number (Arabic numerals).
